_doc: Default Governor policy for the Boardroom. Conservative on purpose — tune to your plan. Token ceilings are runaway-loop backstops, NOT cadence levers: set them high enough that your intended cadence never trips them, low enough that a bug cannot run away. See governor.md for the full spec.

model_tiering._help: primary_model runs decision-stakes scenes. routine_model (a smaller or local model) runs low-stakes heartbeats; set to null to use primary_model for everything. decision_stakes_impact: topics scoring >= this on the 1-10 impact scale use the primary model.

dynamic_mode._help: Only used when mode == 'dynamic'. Ignored in schedule mode.

_field_help.mode: 'schedule' = convene at fixed clock hours (scheduled scenes are forced but still respect token ceilings + kill switch). 'dynamic' = self-throttle by human activity + impact gate.
_field_help.schedule_hours_local: Local-clock hours (0-23) at which the room convenes one scene. Check every ~15 min; each slot fires once per day.
_field_help.max_conversations: Live conversations retained; oldest beyond this are archived.
_field_help.kill_switch: Create the disable flag (see installer output) to pause instantly; it overrides everything here.
